name: database-safety
description: Block destructive database operations — migrations, drops, and resets
author: sieteunoseis

hooks.name: Block destructive SQL
hooks.description: Blocks DROP DATABASE, DROP TABLE, TRUNCATE, and DELETE without WHERE

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -iqE '(DROP (DATABASE|TABLE|SCHEMA)|TRUNCATE TABLE|DELETE FROM [a-z]+ *$|DELETE FROM [a-z]+ *;)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: destructive database operation detected. Review the SQL before running."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block migration resets
hooks.description: Blocks migrate:fresh, migrate:reset, prisma migrate reset, and similar commands

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(migrate:fresh|migrate:reset|prisma migrate reset|prisma db push --force|db:drop)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: database migration reset detected. This will destroy and recreate tables."}'; fi; }
